payload.invariant: ={glob A} /\ inv_cpa SplitC2.I1.RO.m{1} SplitC2.I2.RO.m{1} Mem.log{1} Mem.log{2} Mem.lc{1} Mem.lc{2} BNR.lenc{1} BNR.lenc{2} BNR.ndec{1} BNR.ndec{2} /\ (forall n c, (n,c) \in SplitC1.I2.RO.m{1} => n \in BNR.lenc{1}) /\ (forall n c, (n,c) \in SplitD.ROF.RO.m{1} => n \in BNR.lenc{1})

manager_note: Read-only context. Accepted/rejected tactic or call text inside a preview is route-selection information, not the current proof-state error.

manager_actions.outcome: The previewed call did not typecheck against the daemon; no tactic was committed.

content.title: Call Obligation Preview
content.preview: === Call subgoal preview === `call (_: ={glob A} /\ inv_cpa SplitC2.I1.RO.m{1} SplitC2.I2.RO.m{1} Mem.log{1} Mem.log{2}...)` was rejected by the daemon BEFORE we could preview subgoals: The module A can write A (add restriction A to A, or A to A) Common causes: • invariant has a typo / unresolved name → check with `-where <ident>` • invariant uses a side annotation incorrectly ({1} vs {2}) → re-read the goal's pre to see which side each var lives on • the trailing call doesn't take this invariant — if it's a non-adversary call (named `call LEMMA`), use `call <lemma_name>` not `call (_: I)`
